final_answer: COVID-19 is an illness caused by the virus severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. It spreads between people in close contact, mainly through the air in tiny droplets of fluid [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. Most people have mild illness or no symptoms, but older adults and people with certain medical conditions are at higher risk of serious illness [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000].
